{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ancestor's Spear
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Ancestor's Spear Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The Ancestor's [[Spear]] is a signature sacred weapon of the [[Jai clan]], characterized by its glowing white shaft composed of [[Forged white madra]] and etched with various lines of script. According to clan legends, the original Matriarch used this weapon to siphon power from her enemies. In practice, the spear utilizes its script to guide [[madra]], allowing a user to absorb and collect energy from opponents. [[Jai Long]] utilized this ability to accelerate his own power acquisition, though he initially lacked the technique to use it effectively. The weapon's functionality is heavily dependent on its script and [[binding]]; during a confrontation, the spear was destroyed by [[Blackflame]], disintegrating into white dust and leaving behind only a single glinting spearhead. Despite the destruction of the main shaft, small shards of the weapon remained, and its ability to guide [[madra]] served as a functional blueprint for later attempts at creating similar bindings.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Ancestor's [[Spear]] is a glowing shaft composed of [[Forged white madra]] and etched with lines of script. Kept within a specialized case, the weapon is characterized by its white color despite lacking any [[Stellar Spear madra]]. During combat, [[Jai Long]] utilized the weapon to strike a [[Remnant]]'s rib cage and inflicted various cuts upon bodies.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] is a glowing shaft of [[Forged white madra]] scratched with lines of script.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] is associated with the bodies [[Jai Long]] cut.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] used the [[Ancestor's Spear]] to strike the [[Remnant]]'s rib cage.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] is white but does not contain [[Stellar Spear madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] comes in a case.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Found within a [[labyrinth]], the Ancestor's [[Spear]] is a weapon characterized by its white shaft and a single script etched upon its spearhead. This object functions through the combined use of a script and [[madra]], though both its bindings and its energy source originate from an unknown source. Despite being one of the weakest objects located in the [[labyrinth]] maze, it possesses the power to inflict wounds that fail to heal properly. During combat, [[Jai Chen]] utilized the weapon to stab [[Jai Daishou]], and it later demonstrated the ability to rapidly advance [[Jai Long]] from [[Highgold]] to [[Truegold]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] has a script.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] has a white shaft.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Ancestor's Spearhead has a single script on its surface.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] is a weapon that can cause wounds that do not heal correctly.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] is a weapon used by [[Jai Chen]] to stab [[Jai Daishou]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The bindings and [[madra]] for the [[Ancestor's Spear]] came from an unknown source.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] functioned using both a [[binding]] and a script.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] is one of the weakest objects in the [[labyrinth]] maze.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] was able to take [[Jai Long]] from [[Highgold]] to [[Truegold]] quickly.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] was found in a [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] was simpler to use than the hunger binding.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Ancestor's Spear]] uses [[scripts]] to guide [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“It's white, but it isn't Stellar Spear madra, is it...no, it's something else.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Ancestor's Spear,” Lindon said. “One of the weakest objects in the maze.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
